mission.title: valkey: [NEW] Atomic slot migration HLD
mission.description: [NEW] Atomic slot migration HLD . Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current valkey setup
steps.description:
Verify your valkey version and configuration:
```bash
valkey-server --version
```
This feature requires a working valkey installation.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
**Last Updated:  Jan 12, 2025**

# Problem Statement

Efficient slot migration is critical for maintaining the scalability and resilience of Valkey clusters, but the current client-driven migration approach presents significant challenges.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [NEW] Atomic slot migration HLD
steps.description:
and I discussed another option (in the context of atomic slot migration) which essentially implements slot-level replication. Here is the high level flow

1. source (parent) forks a child with a set of slots to migrate
2. child streams slots to be migrated in the RDB format (same as replication)
3.
```yaml
valkey-cli -h 10.0.0.3 -p 6379
> HELLO 3
> CLUSTER IMPORT SLOTS 1000 2000 
c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286 
> CLUSTER IMPORT STATUS OPID c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286 
1# "requested-slots" => (integer) 1001 
2# "completed-slots" => (integer) 800 
3# "failed-slots" => (integer) 50 
4# "importing-slots" => (integer) 15 
5# "canceled-slots" => (integer) 0 
> CLUSTER IMPORT CANCEL OPID c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286
 +OK 
> CLUSTER IMPORT STATUS OPID c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286 
1# "requested-slots" => (integer) 1001 
2# "completed-slots" => (integer) 800

```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[NEW] Atomic slot migration HLD " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
and I discussed another option (in the context of atomic slot migration) which essentially implements slot-level replication. Here is the high level flow

1. source (parent) forks a child with a set of slots to migrate
2. child streams slots to be migrated in the RDB format (same as replication)
3. target needs to support no-blocking load of the RDB stream (think of co-routines)
4.
codeSnippets:
valkey-cli -h 10.0.0.3 -p 6379
> HELLO 3
> CLUSTER IMPORT SLOTS 1000 2000 
c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286 
> CLUSTER IMPORT STATUS OPID c7e98d63-5717-479f-8b8a-4c1d49720286 
1# "requested-slots" => (integer) 1001 
2# "completed-slots" => (integer) 800 
3# "failed-slots" => (integer) 50 
4# "importing-slots" => (integer) 15

 +OK
